overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character exploring a futuristic medical clinic interior. The character walks through a clean, white-and-blue metallic facility with holographic displays, medical equipment, and a reception area, approaching an elevator at the back of the room.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the medical bay past the reception desk and medical equipment along the left wall

notable_agents.action: seated at the reception desk in a white lab coat, observing the character as they pass by

entered.detail: large circular green holographic display with RM logo mounted on the left wall
glass and metal reception counter with seated attendant
rack of futuristic medical devices and monitors against the left wall
circular wall poster with BREATHE text and planet graphic
tall white water dispenser unit against the center wall
modern blue upholstered seating furniture along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the entrance area of a futuristic medical clinic, passing a reception desk with a seated NPC on the left. The room features clean white paneling, blue accent lighting, a large green holographic display, and medical equipment. Blue sofas line the right wall as the character moves deeper into the facility toward the back wall.

events.description: character turns right to face the elevator doors at the back of the clinic

agents.ego_description: turning toward and walking to the illuminated elevator at the back of the room

entered.detail: futuristic elevator with glowing cyan interior and open metal doors
red illuminated EXIT sign mounted above the elevator doors
dark counter with equipment against the back right wall

segments.scene_description: The character turns toward the back of the clinic where a futuristic elevator with glowing cyan doors comes into view. The reception area elements fall behind as the character approaches the elevator lobby, with the blue sofas now visible on the left side. The character walks directly toward the elevator doors beneath a red exit sign.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sterile medical clinic that transitions from a wide reception area to a focused approach toward an elevator. It begins by moving past a reception desk with a seated NPC, gliding through a space defined by white paneling, blue accent lighting, and a large green holographic display. As the character moves deeper into the facility, the medical equipment and blue sofas on the right shift in perspective, gradually falling behind. The scene then opens into the elevator lobby, where the blue sofas now line the left side as the camera turns toward the back of the clinic. Finally, the movement culminates in a direct approach toward glowing cyan elevator doors positioned beneath a red exit sign.
